title: Water Trail
description: Adds small dripping particles when the player leaves water or rain.
body: This client-side mod adds small, dynamic particle effects when the player interacts with water, rain, or lava. When the player exits water or rain, tiny water particles appear around them. Additionally, if the player drinks a Fire Resistance potion while standing in lava, small lava particles will drip from them as they leave the lava.
